subject: {{extras.customer.contact_name}} has completed their eligibility check for finance

rows.text: {{extras.customer.contact_name}} has completed their eligibility check on Ideal4Finance.

Once you have finalised their design, you will need to convert their Introduction into a Job to send the order to their tradesperson to confirm. Please also use the email template provided by Marketing to send an order breakdown to {{extras.customer.contact_name}} to provide them with more detail.

rows.subtext: For finance queries please email Ideal4Finance at support@kanda.co.uk or call us on 0330 808 3911.
